title: Nasdaq partnering with crypto exchange Kraken to develop framework for tokenized stock trading, enabling 24/7 blockchain-based equity trading
message_html: Nasdaq partnering with crypto exchange Kraken to develop framework for tokenized stock trading, enabling 24/7 blockchain-based equity trading ...
snippet: Wu Blockchain (@WuBlockchain): According to WSJ, Nasdaq is partnering with crypto exchange Kraken to develop a framework for tokenized stock trading, enabling 24/7 trading of blockchain-based versions of listed equities, with the initiative expected to launch around early 2027 pending SEC approval.

title: Stablecoin fintech KAST raises $80 million in Series A to fund global expansion
message_html: Stablecoin fintech KAST raises $80 million in Series A to fund global expansion ...
snippet: KAST has raised $80 million in a Series A led by QED Investors and Left Lane Capital, valuing the startup at $600 million.
